title: payment_watcher: activate_subscription_atomic is correct — uses invoice expires_at not runtime
description: relay/src/payment_watcher.rs:370-428: activate_subscription correctly uses the invoice's own expires_at (set at creation time, shown to the user) rather than re-computing from current subscription_days. The max() at line 397 handles late payments by granting a fresh period. This correctly preserves the subscription promise made at invoice time. A contributor might suggest 'simplify by always computing from now + days' — this would silently break the duration promise for invoices created with a different operator setting.
